source_intent.raw_intent: Case 049: I am a enterprise_compliance_lead in Latin America. Build a blueprint_design_doc for finance_ops using the compliance_lens. Chaos input type is overbroad_one_pass_lock. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Design a governed blueprint for finance operations in Latin America, using a compliance lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a deployable artifact with explicit validation gates. Scope: - Covers finance operations workflows (e.g., transaction processing, reconciliation, reporting) for an enterprise in Latin America, incorporating local regulatory compliance (e.g., tax, anti-money laundering, data privacy). Includes validation gates at each stage to ensure compliance before proceeding. Constraints: - Must comply with Latin American financial regulations (e.g., SAT in Mexico, SUNAT in Peru, RFB in Brazil). - Must include explicit validation gates (e.g., compliance checkpoints, audit trails). - Must be implementable on Codex runtime. - Must handle overbroad one-pass lock scenario (i.e., single pass through all gates without branching). - Must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Success Criteria: - Blueprint document contains all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract. - Each finance operation step has a corresponding validation gate defined. - Validation gates are testable and auditable. - Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 without manual intervention. Output Contract: - format: blueprint_design_doc - sections: Objective; Scope; Constraints; Success Criteria; Output Contract - validation_gates: Gate 1: Input validation (transaction data completeness and format); Gate 2: Regulatory compliance check (local tax and AML rules); Gate 3: Authorization and approval workflow; Gate 4: Audit trail generation and logging; Gate 5: Final reconciliation and reporting - runtime: Codex - compliance_lens: Latin America financial regulations
